channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Sanctions Networks Financing West Bank Settler Violence
item.description: Britain announced coordinated sanctions with five international partners targeting networks involved in financing, enabling and carrying out settler violence in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Bans Israeli Finance Minister Smotrich Over Gaza Recolonisation Call
item.description: France barred entry to far-right Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich, condemning his calls for Palestinian resettlement and recolonisation of Gaza, as part of coordinated sanctions with five allied nations.

item.title: 🇧🇬🇺🇦 Bulgaria Halts All Military Aid to Ukraine
item.description: Bulgaria Defense Minister Dimitar Stoyanov announced the country will no longer send weapons to Ukraine, marking a significant shift in European support for Kyiv.

item.title: 🇫🇮⚛️ Finland Moves to Allow Nuclear Weapons Transport in Crisis Situations
item.description: Finland defense committee backed legal changes to permit nuclear weapons transport during crises, moving restrictions into criminal code while allowing allied nuclear arms transit.

item.title: 🇨🇳📊 China Exports Surge Past Forecasts on AI-Driven Demand
item.description: Chinese export growth accelerated in May, beating expectations on strong demand for chips, autos and high-tech goods fueling the global AI boom.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Confronts China Over Scarborough Shoal Incident
item.description: Philippines accused China of aggressive maneuvers near Scarborough Shoal as maritime tensions escalate in the South China Sea.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Xi Jinping Cements Sway Over North Korea as Kim Names China Top Priority
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping wrapped up his first visit to North Korea in seven years with deeper bilateral understanding, as Kim Jong Un prioritizes China ties over Russia alliance.

item.title: 🇺🇸⛽ Trump Approval Near Record Low as Americans Expect Higher Gas Prices
item.description: Only 22% of Americans approve of Trump's handling of living costs as Iran war drives expectations of sustained higher fuel prices.

item.title: 💰 Investors See Tipping Point for Bonds After Geopolitics Shreds Old Playbooks
item.description: Bonds failed to shield investors during the Iran war, but fund managers say debt may reclaim safe-haven role if inflation starts hitting growth.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ Two High-Ranking Military Personnel Killed in Israeli Strikes on Iran
item.description: Iran confirmed the deaths of two high-ranking military personnel from Israeli strikes, as both sides exchanged fire despite ongoing ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israeli Ministers Call for Bombing Beirut and Detaining Women in Revenge on Hezbollah
item.description: Far-right Israeli ministers proposed bombing Beirut and detaining Lebanese women and youth to pressure Hezbollah during a security cabinet meeting.

item.title: 🇬🇧🔍 Secret Camera Found in Whitehall Building Near Chinese Embassy Approval Site
item.description: A covert camera was discovered in a government building near where Chinese embassy planning decisions are made, raising security concerns.

item.title: 🇫🇮 Finland: YLE Reports on Defense Nuclear Transport Law Changes
item.description: Finnish public broadcaster YLE reports on government proposals to allow nuclear weapons transport in crisis situations.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Set to Discuss Deportation of Afghan Refugees with Taliban
item.description: European Union is preparing to discuss potential deportations of Afghan refugees, engaging with Taliban authorities on migration issues.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Pentagon Adds Alibaba and Others to Chinese Military Companies List
item.description: The US Defense Department updated its list of companies linked to the Chinese military, adding tech giant Alibaba and other prominent businesses.

item.title: 🇰🇵 China and North Korea Agree to Expand Cooperation Across Sectors
item.description: Xi Jinping's first visit to North Korea in seven years yielded agreements to expand bilateral cooperation across multiple sectors.

item.title: 🇮🇷 IAEA Calls on Iran to Re-Engage as West Pressures with Resolution
item.description: UN nuclear watchdog chief Rafael Grossi urged Iran to re-engage with inspections at sites bombed by US and Israel, as Western powers push for accountability.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚽ FIFA World Cup Flag Dispute as Iranians Barred from Waving Pre-1979 Flag
item.description: Iranian football fans living abroad explain why they want to wave Iran's pre-1979 Islamic revolution flag at World Cup matches, highlighting political tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ Trump's Past Under Scrutiny as Maine Senate Primary Voters Decide
item.description: A crucial Maine Senate primary sees candidates' past records under scrutiny as voters decide who will represent their party.

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 China Prepares $295 Billion Plan for Nationwide AI Infrastructure Buildout
item.description: China is preparing a massive $295 billion funding plan to build out nationwide AI infrastructure, aiming to compete with US technological dominance.

item.title: 🇪🇪🇺🇦 Zelenskyy Arrives in Estonia for Nordic-Baltic Summit
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy arrived in Estonia to attend a summit of Nordic and Baltic leaders and meet with Estonian President Alar Karis.

item.title: 🇩🇪 German Exports Rise Unexpectedly in April
item.description: German exports increased unexpectedly in April despite ongoing global trade tensions and energy price pressures from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🚁 Crew Rescued After US Helicopter Goes Down Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Two US helicopter crew members were rescued after their Apache gunship went down in the Iranian-controlled Strait of Hormuz, with Trump confirming they are fine.

item.title: 🇨🇳💻 Microsoft Cuts Hundreds of Cloud Jobs in China as US Tightens Data Laws
item.description: Microsoft is cutting hundreds of cloud computing jobs in mainland China as US data laws tighten and geopolitical pressures mount on technology companies.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Beijing Condemns US Move to Blacklist Chinese Companies
item.description: China condemned the US decision to add more Chinese companies to its military-linked entities list, calling it unfair suppression of Chinese businesses.
